GenAiFunction.description:
Read, create, update, or delete DEVELOPMENT metadata via the Salesforce Tooling API. Use for code artifacts and granular schema pieces that the Metadata API cannot manipulate individually.
Use for: - Code: ApexClass, ApexTrigger (body, status, symbols) - Schema pieces: CustomField, CustomObject, ValidationRule - UI: Layout, WorkflowRule
Supported operations: - query: SOQL against Tooling API objects - create / update / delete: single-record CRUD on development artifacts
NOT for: - Configuration metadata documents (PermissionSet, Profile, Flow, CustomLabel, ConnectedApp, GenAiPlugin) — use CallMetadataApi. - Business data records (Account, Opportunity, custom __c) — use QueryRecordsWithSoql (read) or CallRestApi (write). - Data Cloud — use QueryDataCloud or ExploreDataCloud.
If the action errors with "not supported", use SearchWeb to confirm the correct API (Metadata vs Tooling) and retry with CallMetadataApi.
